Influence Q&A with Bas Wouters
Ask Your Questions to Bas Wouters
Join an exclusive Q&A session with Bas Wouters, co-founder & CEO of the Cialdini Institute. Bas will share insights on the
Principles of Persuasion and how you can ethically apply them. Ask him anything about applying the principles of influence into
your life and business. Take advantage of this chance to ask your questions!
Influence Q and A
www.getwsodo.com
